name: GitHub MCP
description: Read GitHub issues, pull requests, and repositories. Search code, post comments, and manage releases.

envVars.name: GITHUB_TOKEN
envVars.description: Personal access token. classic or fine-grained; minimum scopes: repo, read:org.

args.name: repo-allowlist
args.description: Comma-separated org/repo allowlist; restricts the server to these repositories.
